  circuit_proof_start

  <;> try simp_all [testCircuit]

<;> simp_all [TestAssumptions, TestSpec]
  <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₁ := h_holds
        have h₂ := h_input
        simp_all [ConstraintsHold.Soundness, eval_unit]
        <;>
          (try tauto)
        <;>
          (try simp_all [Circuit.eval_var, Environmentuses_local_witnesses])
        <;>
          (try aesop)
      })
  <;>
    (try aesop)
  <;>
    (try tauto)
  <;>
    (try norm_num)
  <;>
    (try simp_all [Circuit.eval_var, Environmentuses_local_witnesses])
  <;>
    (try aesop)
  <;>
    (try tauto)
  <;>
    (try norm_num)
```lean>

  <;>

    (try simp_all [TestAssumptions, TestSpec]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try simp_all [TestAssumptions, TestSpec]) <;>
    (try decide)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      aesop

  <;>

      simp_all [TestAssumptions, TestSpec]
